---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What is the friction today? Concrete scenario if possible.

## Proposal

Rough shape of the change. Does not need to be final.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you did not pick them.

## Scope

- Affected files/modules:
- Breaks anything? (compat, config, workflow)
- Design notes to read first: (e.g. `.dev/learner-spec.md`, `.claude/rules/...`)

## Willingness

- [ ] I can open a PR for this
- [ ] I want to discuss first, not commit to implementation
